title: World of Tanks HEAT Review – Should You Try This Game? | Gameplay Demo Analysis
description: World of Tanks HEAT tries to shake up tank combat by speeding things up without losing the tactical edge that fans expect from the genre. In this gameplay demo analysis, you’ll see how its Quick Match, Versus AI, and objective-based modes actually play out, and whether the faster arcade-style approach makes battles more fun or just more chaotic. From 5v5 team fights and dog-tag style eliminations to domination-based capture points, HEAT pushes constant action with tanks that feel heavy but responsive. Add in Agents, tank classes, and a progression system built around missions, credits, and upgrades, and you get a game that’s clearly aiming for both strategy and accessibility. But the real question is simple: does all of this actually come together in a way that keeps matches exciting over time, or does the chaos eventually wear thin? This review breaks down gameplay feel, modes, progression, customization, and early impressions from the demo to help you decide if World of Tanks HEAT is worth trying. video credits: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_QhttYcOGcI https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-_dTomaLNwY #worldoftanksheat
creator: Jerry Plays

title: I Tried the NEW World of Tanks...
description: World of Tanks: HEAT released… and the reception has already been brutal. After spending nearly 3 hours inside the game, I genuinely started questioning whether this was actually ready to launch. Crashes, lack of content, bizarre design choices, dead-feeling menus and a community reaction that’s already overwhelmingly negative. So in this video, we’re diving deep into Wargaming’s newest game and seeing exactly what went wrong. Bell? ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ World of Tanks (WoT) is a massively multiplayer online game developed by the company Wargaming, featuring mid-20th century (1930s–1960s) era combat vehicles. It is built upon a freemium business model where the game is free-to-play, but participants also have the option of paying a fee for use of "premium" features. The focus is on player vs. player gameplay with each player controlling an armored vehicle. title: World of Tanks HEAT - Did Wargaming Make the Wrong Game?
description: World of Tanks HEAT just launched — and I don't think the question is whether it's good or bad. The real question is whether Wargaming built it for the right players. HEAT is a faster, ability-driven tank shooter with Agents, objective modes, and respawns. It's not the tactical, positional game WoT veterans know. And that gap between what existing players wanted and what Wargaming built is at the center of everything happening with this game right now. In this video I cover: - Why Wargaming chose HEAT over World of Tanks 2 - The identity problem: who is this game actually for? - Why Steam reviews don't tell the full story - What alpha testers are saying — and why it's concerning - The crash issues at launch and the fix that worked for me - The economy — and whether Wargaming learned anything I also played an earlier alpha version. Check that video here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=99F4SKyZZEw] My take: 6/10 — the concept isn't wrong. The targeting might be.  If you enjoyed this video format, please vote with a click or two, so you don’t miss out on future deep-dives and advanced guides—hit that SUBSCRIBE button and ring the bell! Follow Me: https://twitter.com/DefensiveGames https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61550769549494 My PC Specs: AMD Ryzen 9 7950X3D 4.2GHz MSI GeForce RTX 4090 VENTUS 3X OC 24GB GDDR6X 384-bit 64GB DDR5 6000MHz CL40 Dual Channel SSD ADATA Legend 960 Max 4TB PCI Express 4.0 x4 M.2 1440P Monitor Music and sound FX used in this video are from EpidemicSound: https://www.epidemicsound.com/ #worldoftanksheat #wotheat #wargaming

title: WORLD OF TANKS HEAT Closed Beta Gameplay | New Brutal FREE GAME with EPIC OPEN WORLD WWII BATTLES
description: *_Footage recorded by ENFANT TERRIBLE. Exclusive access provided by Best Vision PR. Unauthorized use and/or duplication of this video is strictly prohibited._* Check out this new closed beta gameplay from the upcoming World of Tanks: Heat developed in a proprietary engine. We captured this new preview demo footage with RTX 5090 in native 4K (no commentary). This new f2p free to play game represents a tactical shift in the franchise, moving toward a character-driven, "Hero-Tank" combat experience. Set in an alternate post-World War II timeline, the game blends traditional armored warfare with unique Agent abilities. Players choose from a roster of specialized characters, each tethered to specific vehicles, to fulfill tactical roles like defending the front line, pushing objectives, or providing long-range fire support. The gameplay emphasizes objective-based matches with respawns, allowing for a faster, more dynamic pace than previous installments. With a heavy focus on progression, players can fine-tune both their tanks' technical modules and their Agents' skill trees to fit their specific playstyle.  SUMMARY World of Tanks Heat introduces character-driven "Hero-Tank" combat set in an alternate post-WWII timeline. This new RTX 5090 captured gameplay features fast-paced, objective-based matches with deep customization for both specialized Agents and their vehicles.  DESCRIPTION World of Tanks: HEAT is the first ever hero-driven tank action game. It's high-velocity clashes every single battle. It's Agents with unique abilities operating machines with menacing power. Choose your Agent, personalize your tank, and combine skill and strategy to dominate the battlefield.  CLOSED BETA FEATURES - Eight Playable Agents with 3 roles: Defender, Assault, and Marksman. - Starter Roster: Everyone begins with Chopper (Defender), Kent (Assault), and Hound (Marksman). - Unique Kits: Each Agent features a distinct set of skills, a powerful Ultimate ability, and a specific combat function. - Fixed Partnerships: Every Agent is paired with specific vehicles (e.g., Chopper pilots the M1E1). - Flexibility: As you progress, you can unlock a second vehicle option for an Agent to adapt to different tactical needs. - Environments: Maps are based on real-world locations re-imagined with massive structures and alternate-history themes (e.g., aircraft carriers and canyon dams). - Game Modes: A Quick Match queue featuring four different objective-based modes, all of which include respawns. - Squad Play: Support for grouping with friends before entering the matchmaking queue. - Full Cross-Play: A unified player pool across PC (Steam/Wargaming Game Center), Steam Deck, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.  RELEASE DATE AND PLATFORMS Coming for free to PS5, Xbox and PC sometime in 2026.  SUPPORT THE DEVELOPERS Wishlist/Buy on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2100280/World_of_Tanks_HEAT/  FOR DEVELOPERS Want your game featured? Reach out to us via the "About" section of our channel. We do gameplay previews and compilations every day! #newgames2026 #worldoftanksheat #rtx5090

title: HEAT change complètement World of Tanks
description: Playlist complète : Les tests qui vont te rendre accro https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLva00kA4XlK6TtiM2oheEks89S62gPJzu je pensais absolument pas dire ça un jour : HEAT m’a réconcilié avec World of Tanks. Parce qu’après plusieurs heures dessus… J’ai retrouvé une sensation que j’avais complètement perdue sur WoT : le fun immédiat !!! Parce qu’au fil des années… World of Tanks était devenu extrêmement rigide. Entre : - les obus premium - la méta ultra optimisée - la mort définitive - les parties pliées en 3 minutes - et les fameux chars russes qui te renvoient garage avant même d’avoir joué LOL (Merci l'IS-2 lol) La frustration avait fini par prendre le dessus. Et c’est exactement là que HEAT change complètement la formule. Dans cette vidéo on va parler : - du respawn - du système de vengeance - des compétences façon MOBA - des chars modernes - du gameplay arcade assumé - des différences avec World of Tanks - des défauts du jeu - et surtout… pourquoi Wargaming a peut-être enfin compris ce qu’il manquait à ses jeux de tanks. Parce que HEAT n’essaye pas : - d’être War Thunder. - ni une simulation ultra réaliste. Le jeu cherche juste une chose : !!! être fun immédiatement !!! Et honnêtement ? Ça faisait longtemps que j’avais pas ressenti ça sur un jeu de tanks Wargaming. Et autre énorme point fort : - les chars modernes. Abrams. Leopard. Mobilité beaucoup plus nerveuse. Combats plus rapides. Et franchement… ça apporte un énorme vent de fraîcheur après des années de tanks WW2. Alors attention : le jeu n’est pas parfait. Il y a : - des problèmes d’équilibrage - peu de maps - quelques bugs - et certaines compétences discutables Mais malgré ça… HEAT apporte enfin quelque chose que World of Tanks avait perdu : - du rythme. - du chaos. - du plaisir immédiat. Et toi ? Tu préfères : L’approche plus stratégique de World of Tanks ? Ou ce côté beaucoup plus arcade de HEAT ? Je lis tous vos retours. Si la vidéo te plaît : Like Abonnement Cloche Partage La totale. #heat #worldoftanks #wargaming #tank #gaming #jeuxvideo  CHAPITRES  00:00 – INTRODUCTION 02:11 – MON PROBLÈME AVEC WORLD OF TANKS 07:09 – POURQUOI HEAT FONCTIONNE SUR MOI 11:48 – LES CHARS MODERNES CHANGENT TOUT 16:42 – MAIS TOUT N’EST PAS PARFAIT 20:45 – CONCLUSION  RÉSEAUX  https://x.com/AzrielMusic https://facebook.com/azriel.music https://www.twitch.tv/azriel613  CRÉDITS  Miniature : Azriel Musique : Azriel

title: HEAT Closed Beta Starts April 16. Enlist Now!
description: The World of Tanks: HEAT Closed Beta runs April 16-20! Sign up here: https://beta.wotheat.com This is it. After months of Alpha testing, feedback, and iteration, we're opening HEAT to a much larger group of players. The Closed Beta Test (CBT) allows you to jump in and test everything in sight before the game launches. The Closed Beta is a technical test. You will have access to the full game in its current state, so do expect some bugs coming your way. But that's the goal; the more you encounter, the more we can fix. Beyond the technical test, you can also give feedback on any aspect of the game you want. This will influence how the game will be evolving from release and beyond. One more important thing: participants in the Closed Beta are free to share screenshots and videos of the game. If you want to let the world know your thoughts on HEAT, go right ahead. Details: - Runs from April 16, 06:00 UTC to April 20, 07:00 UTC - Access by invitation only; sign up at https://beta.wotheat.com - Progress will be reset after the beta ends ----- Official website: https://wotheat.com Follow our socials: https://linktr.ee/wot_heat Wishlist HEAT: Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2100280 PlayStation: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10011450 Xbox: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9n11jm7f5cxk

title: World of Tanks: HEAT | Gameplay PC
description: World of Tanks: HEAT is a free-to-play vehicle combat game built for dynamic tactical team play. A unique roster of Agents with diverse skillsets and a variety of highly advanced tanks are yours to control. Find your perfect Agent-tank combo, build your ride with hi-tech weaponry, and fight it out in a world where technology and innovation have reinvented tank combat. HEAT drops you into intense 5v5 skirmishes and larger 10v10 clashes where there’s room for both personal skill and team coordination. There are no "win buttons”; the battlefield is equal for everyone, and victory goes to those who communicate, adapt, and outthink the enemy. Fight, win, lose, master new tricks, and come back stronger every new battle. Choose your Agent, each with unique abilities that define how you fight, hold ground, and time your strikes to maintain momentum. Every tank in HEAT is upgradable. Tune your tank and mix experimental modules to match your playstyle. Every combination feels different on the battlefield, so experiment until you find what clicks. HEAT is powered by a completely new engine built from the ground up, with full support for the most advanced lighting systems, particle effects, and VFX available. This makes every explosion, impact, and ability feel like you’re witnessing it live. HEAT runs seamlessly on PC (Wargaming Game Center and Steam), Steam Deck, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and GeForce NOW. All your Agents and tanks are ready for action, no matter what gear you play on. Log in with a single Wargaming account to sync your progression instantly across all your devices. HEAT is set in an alternate post-WWII timeline, where science has triumphed and the world blooms with technical marvels. But peace is fragile, and behind the facade of harmony lurks an intensifying arms race. Your arsenal will be packed with cutting-edge technologies, all based on real-life scientific and design concepts. This "what if" machinery is heavy, brutal, and built to shred armor. It is a world where engineering beauty is forged for the frontlines.

title: M60A2 in World of Tanks: HEAT Closed Beta Clips and Replay
description: Clips and replay of M60A2 gameplay during the World of Tanks: HEAT Closed Beta 1. The M60A2 Starship is a close-mid range firepower-oriented vehicle, driven by the assault agent Reaper in WoT: HEAT. Its has two abilities: 20mm AA guns firing APHE, and a HE Shillelagh missile that sets enemies on fire. Reaper's passive ability allows him to survive heavy fire for a short time, and his ultimate is a napalm airstrike.

title: LIVE GAMEPLAY: HEAT beta | World of Tanks

title: World of Tanks HEAT: Leopard DA MUITO DANO!| Gameplay e Habilidades
description: Fala galera! Mais um vídeo de World of Tanks HEAT, e hoje a gameplay é pesada com o poderoso Leopard 1 A6!  Se você curte um tanque com perfil de Sniper, que bate forte de longe e causa um dano massivo, esse é o seu veículo. Diferente do XM1, que é linha de frente, o Leopard exige mais posicionamento tático e visão de jogo – e eu mostro exatamente como aproveitar o melhor dele nessa partida de captura (5v5) insana. O jogo está sem bots, rodando liso e muito divertido, com a galera de PC, Xbox e PlayStation caindo no mesmo lobby (crossplay liberado!).  O que você vai ver neste vídeo: Dicas de posicionamento e gameplay de Sniper com o Leopard 1 A6 Dano crítico na munição dos inimigos (World of Tanks cantou!) Uso de habilidades como Decoy e Ultimates táticas A importância absurda de jogar o objetivo e capturar as bandeiras Como funcionam os Upgrades do tanque (Rotação, Zoom de mira e Reparos rápidos) Mesmo com um time que não ajudou a capturar os objetivos, consegui puxar quase 22.000 de dano e 9 kills! Quer ver como? Assiste até o final! Não esquece de deixar aquele LIKE se curtiu o vídeo, de COMENTAR o que está achando de World of Tanks HEAT e de se INSCREVER no canal para não perder os próximos conteúdos de militaria e tanques!  Assista também às nossas Lives: Venha jogar e interagir com a gente ao vivo! title: [WoT: HEAT] Uncovering What's New
description: Official channels and accounts of "World of Tanks: HEAT" have been very active recently, with daily posts and possibly more in-depth content to come. But have they already revealed more than what they have let on? The answer is yes. In this video, we will take a much closer look at what changes have been shown since the 2nd alpha test. Please note that all thoughts and speculations are mine, and do not imply anything more than what is stated. Inaccuracies that come to light may be attributed to errors in my logic or future changes in game content (as this game is still a work in progress). All in-game media in this video are Wargaming.net property and were retrieved from public channels in the World of Tanks: HEAT Discord server (https://discord.gg/wot-heat) and media of the official YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/@WoT_HEAT). Reference historical images are not mine and credited to their respective sources. World of Tanks: HEAT is a free-to-play PvP vehicle shooter with powerful abilities and explosive team combat. Pilot customizable tanks and unleash Agent skills in 10v10 online battles, where tactical warfare meets FPS-style intensity. Take control. Rewrite the rules. title: Стоит ли играть в НОВЫЙ Мир Танков WOT: HEAT | World of Tanks 2026
description: Честный обзор World of Tanks: HEAT  В этом видео честно разберемся с плюсами и минусами игры Wot: HEAT. Что мы получили на релизе? Чем отличается от классического Мира Танков. Лучше или Хуже? Плюсы и Минусы? Какие есть танки, агенты, режимы игры и многое другое. Разберем:  Танки и агенты  Плюсы и минусы  Режимы игры  Есть ли баги?  Кому стоит попробовать игру? title: AMX-10 RC — Eye of the Team! Wheeled Sniper with INSANE DPM | WoT HEAT
description: The AMX-10 RC — the eye of the team. French wheeled sniper with mobility, precision, and surprisingly good sustained DPM. If your team needs vision, this is the tank to bring. In this video I take the AMX-10 RC out for a full match: scouting, picking off targets at range, and flanking when the moment opens up.   WHY THIS TANK • Mobile — wheeled chassis, fast acceleration and top speed • High DPM — fast reload, consistent damage output • Scout role — spotting range + speed = eye of the team • Precise gun handling — accurate at distance  More WoT HEAT content • ALVT Mini Abrams Review → [https://youtu.be/6286Ouz3W7M] • ALVT APHE Burn Compilation → [https://youtu.be/SMsgbBTXHCA] • FREE Leopard Skin + Glass Cannon Gameplay → [https://youtu.be/9MOtPEqyRpQ] • XM1V Bombing Ultimate → [https://youtu.be/rTbMQXh1oLA]  About this channel Tank gameplay videos featuring the M1A2 Abrams, XM1 90, T-series, Leopards and more. Expect first looks at new releases, deep-dive guides on tactics and module choices, and unfiltered match commentary. Whether you're a veteran commander or fresh out of the garage — welcome aboard. #WoTHEAT #WorldOfTanks #TankGameplay #LunaTanker

title: World of Tanks: HEAT | Module System Overview | Closed Beta| 4k
description: In this video, I’m giving a first look at how the module system works in World of Tanks: HEAT and how it changes the way tanks can be customized and played.  You’ll see how different modules can affect: Tank performance and playstyle Mobility, defense, and firepower options Tactical choices depending on the situation How builds can completely change a tank’s role on the battlefield Instead of fixed setups, each tank can be adapted with different combinations, allowing more flexible and strategic gameplay.  This is based on Closed Beta gameplay, so some mechanics may change in the final version.  The goal of this video is to give a clear idea of how the system looks and feels in action.

На этом стриме нас ждёт тестирование новинок: проверим технику в бою, разберём особенности машин и посмотрим, как они влияют на баланс и геймплей.  Новые танки и их характеристики в бою  Тестирование техники в реальных сражениях  Разбор сильных и слабых сторон новых машин  Тактика, позиционирование и контроль карты  Динамичные бои и напряжённые противостояния  Первые впечатления и анализ обновления HEAT World of Tanks: HEAT приносит свежий контент и новые возможности для тактической игры на поле боя. На стриме вместе разберёмся, насколько сильны новые танки, как они ощущаются в сражениях и стоит ли менять привычные стратегии. title: How to transfer xp in World of Tanks: HEAT.
description: Quick walkthrough on how to transfer xp to other tanks in World of Tanks: HEAT. Note, you need to purchase heat tokens with real world money in order to transfer the xp. The transfer rate is at a ratio of 50 xp = 1 heat token. 1. Select agent and tank to receive the xp. 2. Select 'Modify Vehicle.' 3. Select the 'Progression' tab at the top of the screen. 4. Choose a level above your current level. e.g. level 41 is greater than level 40. 5. Select 'Transfer XP.' 6. Select the xp donor tanks. Note, by default all tanks are selected. 7. Use slider to adjust amount of xp to transfer. 8. Select confirm and hold to complete the transfer.

title: WORLD OF TANKS: HEAT | LE TEST TACTIQUE (Gameplay Découverte)
description: Bienvenue sur XS TACTICAL ! On se retrouve aujourd'hui pour une immersion totale dans World of Tanks: HEAT. Si vous me suivez pour mes analyses sur Gray Zone ou Hell Let Loose, vous savez que j'attends beaucoup du réalisme et de la balistique dans un jeu de combat. Dans ce gameplay découverte, on va voir ensemble si ce titre apporte la profondeur tactique nécessaire pour un fan de Milsim. On analyse la gestion des obus HEAT, le positionnement et l'impact du blindage en situation réelle. PARTENAIRE ET SOUTIEN :  Instant Gaming : GZW et vos jeux au meilleur prix ici : https://www.instant-gaming.com/?igr=xos93 (Soutenez la chaîne !) title: World of Tanks: HEAT Beta Gameplay | First Look
description: Welcome to my first video! In this gameplay, I’m testing World of Tanks: HEAT Closed Beta and showing my first impressions of the game. This video focuses on the gameplay experience, tank battles, visuals, and how the game feels in beta. World of Tanks: HEAT is a free-to-play tactical tank shooter with hero abilities, custom tanks, and online PvP action. The closed beta test is available from April 16 to April 20, 2026, and progression resets after the test ends. If you enjoyed the video, drop a like, subscribe, and leave a comment with your first impression of the game. PC Specs: Intel Core i9-13900H 32 GB RAM NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 GPU 8 GB Windows 11 Pro #WorldOfTanksHEAT #WOTheat #Gameplay #BetaGameplay #Gaming #ClosedBeta #TankGame #FirstLook #PCGaming #wargaming
creator: Simply Bera

title: HEAT: 2026 - WOT a la CALL OF DUTY - Mon AVIS !
description: Je déconseille ma chaine au moins de 16 ans, tu y trouveras tous de même Du fun, de la rigolade et une petite touche de rage. Sur cette chaîne présentant des Stream des jeux de TANKS. Et non ! je n'ai pas la prétention de vous apprendre à jouer, mais acquis l’expérience et le savoir pour débattre du passé, présent et futur des jeux, même si tout reste et restera mon avis…. Sur World of Tanks (PC) depuis Aout 2013 et ancien Community contributeur Armored Warfare (PC) de 2016 à 2018 et de Tank Compagny (Android) en 2023, j’ai également été Alfa testeur sur World of Warships (PC), Beta Testeur World of Warships (CONSOLE) et connaissant la plupart des jeux de TANKS, plus ou moins connue passant par War Thunder, Ground War Tanks, Final Fire et j’en passent…. Ne débutant pas sur twitch, ayant arrêté suite à des raisons personnelles, j’avais déjà acquis une certaine réputation 2000 followers sur un compte que je ne puis récupéré « / misterdamingo » et une chaine YouTube que j’ai supprimé et dont je regrette amèrement avec plus de 3000 vidéos, présentations et gameplays commenté
creator: Misterdams62

title: Novi World of Tanks posle 20 godina...
description: Stigla je nova World of Tanks igra – HEAT i moram da kažem… OVO JE SKROZ DRUGA PRIČA! Za razliku od klasičnog WoT-a, HEAT donosi mnogo bržu i eksplozivniju akciju, sa hero ability sistemom, gde svaki tenk i agent imaju posebne moći koje mogu totalno da okrenu borbu. Igra je free-to-play PvP shooter, sa 5v5 i 10v10 borbama, fokusirana na timsku igru, taktiku, ali i čist haos na mapi  Radnja je smeštena u alternativnu post-WW2 realnost, gde su tenkovi napucani futurističkom tehnologijom i sve izgleda kao miks WoT + Overwatch   Moj utisak? Igra je BRUTALNA – mnogo pristupačnija od klasičnog WoT-a, akcija je konstantna (nema kampovanja sat vremena ), i baš ima taj “modern shooter” vibe koji može da privuče novu publiku. Ali… pitanje je da li će otići u pay-to-win ili će ostati skill-based – to tek treba da vidimo   Ako voliš tenkove, ali želiš nešto brže, luđe i modernije – HEAT je definitivno igra koju treba ispratiti! title: World Of Tanks HEAT – The New Best Tank PvP Game?! | XM1 90 Gameplay
description: Jumping into World Of Tanks HEAT with the XM1 90, one of the most mobile and hard-hitting tanks on the battlefield! In this match, I test the XM1 90's speed, firepower, and battlefield dominance against enemy armor in intense PvP combat. Can the XM1 90 carry games and become one of the strongest tanks in World Of Tanks HEAT? Watch as we flank enemies, land devastating shots, and push through chaotic tank battles packed with action and explosions. Final Thoughts After spending some time with World Of Tanks HEAT and the XM1 90, I came away with mixed feelings. There's no denying that the game is visually impressive. The graphics are a clear step up from what we're used to in World of Tanks, with more detailed tank models, better lighting, improved physics, and a generally more modern presentation. Watching tanks move, react to terrain, and engage in combat feels great, and the game definitely has a strong foundation. However, where it struggles is in the depth and variety that made World of Tanks so successful. Compared to World of Tanks' massive roster of vehicles spanning multiple nations, classes, and eras, World Of Tanks HEAT currently offers only a relatively small selection of tanks. On top of that, many of those vehicles are locked behind premium currency, limiting player choice unless they're willing to spend money. The map variety also feels limited. One of the strengths of World of Tanks is that every map has its own identity and tactical flow. Different tank classes shine in different environments, creating a lot of replayability and strategic depth. In HEAT, that level of variety and tactical diversity isn't quite there yet. My overall verdict is that this game had the potential to be something much bigger. Personally, I think Wargaming missed an opportunity to create a true successor to World of Tanks: a modern-era tank game that retains the core gameplay and strategic depth that made the original so popular, while introducing upgraded graphics, better physics, more detailed tank models, improved maps, and a more player-friendly monetization system. Instead, World Of Tanks HEAT feels more like an interesting experiment than the next evolution of the franchise. It has some genuinely great ideas and technology behind it, but it still lacks the content, variety, and long-term depth needed to compete with the game that inspired it. That said, it's still worth checking out if you're curious about modern armored warfare and want to experience a fresh take on tank combat. If you enjoy tank games, armored warfare, and competitive PvP gameplay, make sure to Like , Subscribe , and Comment  with your favorite tank! title: Мнение по 1-му закрытому БЕТА-ТЕСТУ WoT: HEAT. А это уже 3.0?
description: В этом видео разбираем закрытый бета-тест World of Tanks HEAT и пытаемся понять — что это вообще за проект. Это реально шаг вперёд и нам готовят условный World of Tanks 3.0? Или перед нами просто более аркадная версия танков с упором на динамику и эффекты? Я поиграл в ЗБТ, посмотрел на геймплей, интерфейс, управление и общее ощущение от игры — и делюсь своим мнением. Разберём: — интерфейс и перегруженность — новую систему агентов — управление и ощущения от танков — графику и спецэффекты — геймплей: тактика или хаос? И в конце — главный вопрос: стоит ли вообще ждать этот проект или это совсем не то, к чему мы привыкли в классическом WoT. Пишите в комментариях, как вам World of Tanks HEAT — зашло или вообще мимо?

title: M1E1 Chopper Gameplay & Full Review  | World of Tanks HEAT
description: Welcome to the channel tankers!  After 13 years of playing World of Tanks, I finally decided to jump into World of Tanks: HEAT for the very first time  As a long-time WoT veteran, I wanted to see how this brand new game from Wargaming feels, how the gameplay compares, and most importantly… how the community reacts to it  My main game will always be World of Tanks Classic  but I’m excited to give HEAT a real chance and share honest gameplay, reviews, funny moments, and veteran opinions with all of you. Whether you’re a hardcore WoT player or completely new to tank games, you’re welcome here  To all the new people who discovered my channel because of HEAT — definitely give classic World of Tanks a try too!  It’s one of the most iconic tank games ever made and I’ve spent over a decade enjoying it. And for my longtime WoT players… don’t be afraid to try HEAT as well  It’s different, faster, more arcade-like, but it could become something really interesting for the tank gaming community  I’m also currently finishing my Psychology degree , so balancing studies and content creation is not always easy. Every LIKE  COMMENT  and SUBSCRIBE  really helps support the channel more than you know  If you enjoy tank battles, honest opinions, funny moments, and community-driven gameplay, join me on this journey  Stay tuned for more HEAT gameplay, WoT content, reviews, livestreams, and battlefield chaos  #WorldOfTanksHEAT #WoTHEAT #WorldOfTanks #Wargaming #TankGame #Gaming #GamingCommunity #PCGaming #TankBattle #WoT #Streamer #GamingClips #FYP #NewGame #VeteranPlayer #YouTubeGaming

title: World of Tanks: HEAT | This Is How Tank Builds Actually Work  | Closed Beta
description: In this video, I’m giving a first look at how the module system works in World of Tanks: HEAT and how it changes the way tanks can be customized and played.  You’ll see how different modules can affect: Tank performance and playstyle Mobility, defense, and firepower options Tactical choices depending on the situation How builds can completely change a tank’s role on the battlefield Instead of fixed setups, each tank can be adapted with different combinations, allowing more flexible and strategic gameplay.  This is based on Closed Beta gameplay, so some mechanics may change in the final version.  The goal of this video is to give a clear idea of how the system looks and feels in action.

title: World of Tanks: HEAT | First Battle & Tutorial | 4k
description: World of Tanks: HEAT is a free-to-play tactical vehicle shooter developed by Wargaming. Set in an alternate post-WWII world, the game combines fast-paced tank combat with unique Agents, each bringing their own abilities and playstyle to the battlefield. Customize advanced experimental tanks, unlock powerful modules, and fight in intense 5v5 and 10v10 battles across a variety of game modes and maps. With cross-platform play, cross-progression, and a brand-new graphics engine, HEAT delivers a fresh take on armored warfare where teamwork, strategy, and skill decide the outcome of every battle. You can find my Twitch channel, where I stream almost every day:  https://www.twitch.tv/maskof Feel free to support me on this journey!

title: XM1V1 MINEFIELD MASTER  | HEAVY TANK DOMINATION | World of Tanks Heat
description: XM1V1 MINEFIELD MASTER | HEAVY TANK GAMEPLAY | World of Tanks Heat  Hello commanders! Today I'm taking the XM1V1 Heavy Tank into battle in World of Tanks Heat. This is currently one of my favorite tanks in the game because it combines strong armor, excellent survivability, and unique minefield-clearing equipment that makes it both effective and incredibly fun to play. The XM1V1 is built to lead the charge. With its heavy armor, mine-clearing plows, and powerful offensive capabilities, it can push through dangerous areas while supporting the team on the front lines. One of the things I enjoy most is being able to clear minefields and then pressure enemy positions with bombs and devastating firepower. I hope you enjoy this gameplay as much as I enjoyed recording it!  A special thank you to everyone who has supported the channel recently. Your views, likes, comments, and subscriptions mean a lot to me. Seeing the channel grow motivates me to continue creating content and improving every video.  On a personal note, I'm also very excited because I'm getting close to finishing my Psychology degree. Balancing university studies and content creation hasn't always been easy, but your support has helped me stay motivated throughout the journey. If you enjoy the video:  Leave a Like  Subscribe to the Channel  Turn on Notifications  Leave a Comment and let me know which tank you'd like to see next Every like, comment, and subscription helps the channel grow and allows me to create even more World of Tanks Heat content for you. description: HEAT Labs - https://heatlabs.net HEAT Labs is a community-driven hub for World of Tanks: HEAT players, offering guides, tools, updates, and resources to enhance your PvP tank combat experience. Discover strategies, track Agents and tanks, explore custom builds, and stay up-to-date with the latest gameplay tips and tactics to dominate 5v5 and 10v10 online battles. Whether you’re refining your loadouts, mastering abilities, or coordinating with friends, HEAT Labs empowers players with data, insights, and community-driven content to take their game to the next level. HEAT Labs is a community-made project and is not associated with, endorsed by, or affiliated with World of Tanks: HEAT or Wargaming.net. Official soundtrack music extracted from the public build of World of Tanks: HEAT during the first open alpha playtest. Original song name: N/A Join our Discord server: https://discord.heatlabs.net Follow us on Twitter: https://x.com/HEAT_Labs Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/heatlabs_official Follow us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@heatlabs_official Watch us on Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/HEATLabs Find us on GitHub: https://github.com/HEATLabs #heatlabs #worldoftanks #worldoftanksheat #wargamingnet #wargaming #wotblitz #wotheat #wot Support HEAT Labs Buy us a coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/heatlabs Support us on Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/heatlabs Official Merch Store: Coming Soon! World of Tanks: HEAT is a free-to-play PvP tank shooter by Wargaming.net that combines tactical warfare with FPS-style intensity in fast-paced 5v5 and 10v10 online battles. Step into an alternate post-WW2 future as an elite Agent piloting advanced tanks with unique abilities, signature weapons, and modular upgrades, where every loadout choice shapes your strategy. Dominate dynamic battlefields across diverse environments in competitive modes like Conquest, Domination, Kill Confirmed, and Plant & Defuse, solo or with friends, and experience high-impact teamplay that rewards timing, coordination, and precision. Customize your war machine, unlock new Agents and experimental tanks, climb leaderboards, and enjoy deep progression, high replayability, and explosive action, all at zero cost.

title: YENİ OYUN World of Tanks HEAT | İlk Bakış ve Oynanış
description: Merhaba arkadaşlar! Bugün Wargaming'in merakla beklenen yeni oyunu World of Tanks: HEAT'i inceliyoruz. Klasik tank savaşlarından alışık olduğumuz mekaniklerin üzerine "Ajan" (Agent) sistemini ve özel yetenekleri ekleyen bu yeni yapım, tank savaşlarına bambaşka bir soluk getiriyor. Videonun içeriğinde oyunun beta aşamasını, grafiklerini, hızlı oynanış yapısını ve farklı ajan yeteneklerini birlikte görüyoruz. World of Tanks: HEAT, yüksek tempolu 10v10 ve 5v5 modlarıyla taktiksel bir FPS deneyimini tanklarla birleştiriyor. Eğer hızlı aksiyonu ve tankları seviyorsanız, bu oyuna mutlaka şans vermelisiniz! ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Bu kanalda War Thunder tank savaşları, uçak dogfight’ları, helikopter görevleri, zırhlı araç rehberleri ve kamera destekli taktiksel oynanış videoları seni bekliyor.  Oynadığım araçlar: • Modern ana muharebe tankları (MBT) • Avcı uçakları ve jetler • Hafif tanklar, zırhlı araçlar • Helikopterler ve SPAA sistemleri  İçerik Türleri: • War Thunder Türkçe oynanış videoları • Araç incelemeleri ve analizler • Güncel yama notları ve değişiklikler • En iyi grind rotaları ve taktik önerileri  War Thunder ile ilgili her şey burada: • War Thunder Türkiye topluluğu için özel içerikler • Kamera görüntülü, açıklamalı ve stratejik anlatımlı bölümler • Düşük BR’den yüksek BR’ye etkili oynanış örnekleri  Abone olmayı ve War Thunder içeriklerinden haberdar olmak için bildirimleri açmayı unutma! #WarThunder #WarThunderTürkçe #TankOynanış #SoloWThunder #HelicopterBattles #JetDogfight #WarThunderTürkiye #MBT #ZırhlıAraçlar

title: DARMOWY "FPS" z CZOŁGAMI!
description: Dodaj grę do listy życzeń tu - https://bit.ly/kromkaheat World of Tanks: HEAT to całkowicie nowe, niezależne rozszerzenie w uniwersum World of Tanks, które przenosi klasyczny taktyczny pojazdowy pojedynek na dynamiczny, szybszy poziom. Gra osadzona jest w alternatywnej rzeczywistości po II wojnie światowej i oferuje szybkie, emocjonujące starcia drużynowe 10 na 10, gdzie gracze dowodzą „bohaterskimi” czołgami sterowanymi przez Agentów – postaci wyposażone w unikalne umiejętności wspierające i ofensywne. Rozgrywka łączy taktyczne aspekty znane z serii z mechaniką inspirowaną strzelankami typu hero shooter, jak Overwatch. Każdy czołg można głęboko spersonalizować — można montować zaawansowane systemy uzbrojenia, poprawiać armor, dodać wizualne modyfikacje oraz wykorzystywać zdolności zmieniające przebieg bitwy. Gra zostanie wydana na PC (w tym Steam i Game Center), PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S oraz Steam Deck, od razu z pełnym wsparciem dla cross-play i cross-progression — co oznacza, że użytkownicy będą mogli grać na różnych platformach na jednym koncie. Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/kromeczka/ Fanpejdż - https://www.facebook.com/jakubkromkagorka/ Live - https://www.twitch.tv/kromkachleba  Informacje, które mogą Ci się przydać :)   Pamiętaj, że Twoje komentarze, oceny i aktywność na kanale napędza mój rozwój :) Wielkie dzięki!  SUB - www.youtube.com/KromkaChleba90 Bądź na bieżąco z filmami i tym jak rozwija się mój kanał :)

title: WOT: HEAT — ПЕРШИЙ ПОГЛЯД. Це те ЯК МАВ ВИГЛЯДАТИ WOT 2.0
description: Тайм-коди: 00:00 Привітання 01:40 ПОЧАТОК: Відгуки в стім 05:35 ПРОЛОГ та сюжет 11:40 НАЛАШТУВАННЯ та ОПТИМІЗАЦІЯ 34:30 ОСНОВНА МЕХАНІКА 49:00 ПЕРШЕ ЗНАЙОМСТВО З ІГРОВИМ ПРОЦЕСОМ 1:30:00 Гра вилітає 2:15:00 НАЙКРАЩИЙ РЕЖИМ В ГРІї 2:25:45 Знайшов характеристики танка 2:32:00 Більше класного режиму 2:48:00 Реально ГАРНИЙ ігровий процес 3:42:00 ВИЛЬОТИ ПОФІКСИЛИ 4:37:00 Геймплей на XM1V 5:12:00 Запускаю ВЕЛИКУ БІМБУ 5:22:00 ГЛОБАЛЬНИЙ ВИСНОВОК: плюси та мінуси 5:49:00 Спількуємось з чатом Підтримка та подяка за контент: https://donatello.to/WoT.Enthusiast Кава для насторю та фокусу: https://www.radiokava.com.ua/ Промокод: ENT10 на 10% знижки Прайс-лист: Детальний чек статистики — 200 грн. Чек реплея в кінці стріма — 100 грн. Discord: https://discord.gg/Sp57XMxmwH Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/enthusiast_wot Моди: https://aslain.com/index.php?/topic/13-download-%E2%98%85-world-of-tanks-%E2%98%85-modpack/ (Конфігурація Ентузіаст (UA)) Рейтинг: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1U0afsOtU2-FAzae1HX7Irbve8V-IvnT60aWaVHkt0wc/edit?usp=sharing Про мене: Привіт! Моє ім'я Андрій і я — ентузіаст... Це не просто випадковий нік, а вся суть того що я роблю. В далекому 2011 я почав грати в World of Tanks і ця гра захопила мене з перших хвилин і невідпускала до моменту поки я не дізнався про статистику, ВН8 та інші штуки, як щосили намагався покращити, аж до такої межі, що вся гра перетворилась на біль. Після танків дуже активно почав грати в CS:GO і якому намагався розкрити свій скіл на максимум. Збирав команди, вчив психологію гри, паралельно створював ігрові мапи та вивчав те як працюють ігри та ігровий дизайн та періодично стрімив. Після початку великої війни CS для мене стала болючою, тому займався відосиками для інсти про каву та після новин про благодійність WG вирішив повернутись в WoT. Через весь свій досвід та стерту пам'ять про гру дуже здивувався наскільки ця гра цікава та глибока в своїй суті, але на українському ютубі майже завсім не було того контенту який би допоміг мені вивчити цю гру поновому — тому сам почав створювати цей контент. Створювати контент про гру яка мені подобається та розказувати вам про всі її нюанси, ділитись ігровим досвідом, надихати вас на зміну бачення гри і все це з вогнем у серці та на справжньому ентузіазмі. Дякую, що прочитали цю історію, запрошую вас до пергляду прямих трансьляцій чи відео на каналі! --- Команди в чат: !топ — рейтинг танків !обз — щоденник ОБЗ 3.0 !donat — посилання для підтримки !stat — мій акаунт !mod — посилання на мод-пак #wotua #worldoftanks #українською #wot

title: ГАЙД для новичка в World of Tanks:HEAT
description: ТЕЛЕГРАМ WoT:HEAT Express - https://t.me/wot_heat_express Индивидуальный бонус-код для WoT: HEAT от AMD в рамках релиза игры Даёт • 50 000 кредитов • 100 технологии (валюта) • Облик на Кента: «Фантомный Протокол» • 3D-камуфляж на XM1 90: «Горячая Точка» Как получить 1. Перейдите на промо страницу от AMD Gaming https://www.amdgaming.com/promotions/world-of-tanks-heat-giveaway [Для РФ/РБ используйте прокси любой другой страны] 2. Прокрутите в самый низ и нажмите на кнопку «Log in to Claim Key». 3. Войдите в аккаунт AMD (если такого нет — создайте его). [Можете создать аккаунт с помощью одноразовой почты] 4. Подтвердите почту после регистрации (на email придёт код подтверждения). 5. Вернись на промо страницу https://www.amdgaming.com/promotions/world-of-tanks-heat-giveaway войдите в аккаунт AMD и заберите свой бонус-код, нажав на кнопку «Claim Key». 6. Активируйте полученный код в WGC или по ссылке (https://wargaming.net/shop/redeem/). ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Забираем БЕСПЛАТНО валюту и множество кастомизации на свой аккаунт в WoT: HEAT 1. Сначала установите XBOX приложение на компьютер, если оно у вас всё ещё не установлено: aka.ms/xboxinstaller 2. Далее через это приложение войдите в свой аккаунт Microsoft или создайте новый: login.live.com 3. Последовательно заберите саму игру и все DLC к ней (нажимайте на кнопку «Get Free+»): • Игра WoT: Heat — xbox.com/en-US/games/store/world-of-tanks-heat/9N11JM7F5CXK • DLC High-Caliber Squad — xbox.com/en-US/games/store/world-of-tanks-modern-armor-high-caliber-squad/9P2J1XS1X25Q 125 000 кредитов Облик на Чоппера: «Главнокомандующий» • DLC Anchoring Defense — xbox.com/en-US/games/store/world-of-tanks-heat-anchoring-defense/9P4JDSXWBM40 125 000 кредитов блик на Чоппера: «Защитник пустыни» • DLC Forest Frontier — xbox.com/en-US/games/store/world-of-tanks-heat-forest-frontier/9NJFH1TBBGDZ 100 000 кредитов Камуфляж на M1A1: «Лесной рейнджер» • DLC Spring Offensive — xbox.com/en-US/games/store/world-of-warships-legends-spring-offensive/9NH281VFS7TJ 100 000 кредитов Камуфляж на M1A1: «Пустыня» • DLC XBOX Game Pass 300 000 кредитов Облик на Кента: «Зелёные рукава» Камуфляж на XM1 90: «К бою готов» Данное DLC доступно только для обладателей XBOX Game Pass версии «Essential» и выше до 27.06.2026 Если у вас нет подписки XBOX Game Pass, но есть возможность оформить самую простую «Essentials» на 1 месяц всего за 1$ — оформите таковую, заберите DLC и отмените подписку с возвратом средств в течение 14 дней через тех. поддержку. 4. После получения всех DLC войдите в свою учётную запись WoT: HEAT в личном кабинете Wargaming и свяжите её с учётной записью XBOX: wargaming.net/personal/ 5. Чтобы активировать все DLC, скачайте и войдите в игру WoT: HEAT через приложение XBOX! Эти бонусы останутся на вашем аккаунте играя через WGC или Steam. World of Tanks: HEAT es un free-to-play de combates de vehículos con estilo hero shooter + tanques. En vez del WoT clásico, aquí tienes Agentes (personajes con habilidades únicas) que pilotan tanques futuristas y altamente personalizables.  Lo más destacado: Combates rápidos 5v5 y 10v10 intensos Gran énfasis en trabajo en equipo y táctica Cada Agente cambia completamente tu forma de jugar Tanques totalmente customizables con módulos experimentales Tecnología futurista y armas hi-tech  Lanzamiento: 25 de Mayo de 2026 (¡recién salido!) Es como si mezclaran World of Tanks con Overwatch pero en tanques. Acción rápida, mucha personalización y batallas donde la estrategia y la coordinación ganan. ¿Para quién es? Perfecto si te gustan los shooters heroicos pero siempre quisiste destruir todo con tanques épicos  ¿Lo probarías?

title: WORLD OF TANKS: YENİ "HEAT" OYUNU ÇIKTI! | İLK BAKIŞ VE REHBER SOHBET
description: WORLD OF TANKS: YENİ "HEAT" OYUNU ÇIKTI! | İLK BAKIŞ VE REHBER SOHBET  Selam Komutanlar!  Karargahımızda çaylarımızı tazeledik, bugün 26 Mayıs 2026 ve tankçılık dünyasında tam anlamıyla yer yerinden oynuyor! Aylardır gizli forumlarda fısıldanan, sızıntılarıyla heyecan yaratan o devasa haber nihayet resmiyet kazandı: Wargaming, World of Tanks evrenini tamamen bağımsız ve yepyeni bir boyuta taşıyan o özel yapımını, World of Tanks: HEAT oyununu resmen piyasaya sürdü! Gerek oyun mekanikleri gerekse tank zırh dinamikleri üzerine yürüttüğümüz çalışmaların ve resmi moderatörlük tecrübemizin verdiği ilk elden güvenle; bugün bu yepyeni oyunun getirdiği dinamikleri, grafik motorunu ve eski oyundan farklarını samimi bir sohbet eşliğinde masaya yatırıyoruz. Çaylar hazırsa, palet sesleri ve yeni motorların kükremesiyle o efsanevi ilk bakış seansımız başlasın!   World of Tanks: HEAT Nedir? İlk İzlenimler! Bu sadece eski oyuna gelen bir yama veya güncelleme değil; tamamen kimyasal mühimmat fiziği, modern tank mekanikleri ve yüksek tempolu oynanış üzerine kurulmuş bağımsız (standalone) bir yeni nesil tank oyunu!  Saf Termal Fizik ve Akıllı Mühimmatlar: Oyuna adını veren HEAT (Yüksek Patlayıcı Taneli Kimyasal) mühimmatları ve modern zırh delici APFSDS mekanikleri bu oyunun kalbini oluşturuyor. Klasik WoT'taki o hantal top düelloları geride kalmış; zırhların erime noktaları, reaktif zırh (ERA) blokları ve aktif koruma sistemleri sahnede!  Grafikler ve Yeni Oyun Motoru: Mobil cihazların sınırlarını zorlayan muazzam bir görsel şölen. Tankların isabet aldığında metalin kızarması, namlu ağzı alevlerinin gerçekçi termal dalgalanmaları ve patlama efektleri tek kelimeyle büyüleyici.  Taktiksel ve Hızlı Haritalar: Siperlerin dinamik olarak yıkılabildiği, boşluklu zırhlarınızı (Spaced Armor) adaların ve harabe duvarların arkasına saklamanız gereken çok daha agresif, yüksek tempolu yeni harita tasarımları  Orduya Katılın! World of Tanks: HEAT dünyasındaki en güncel rehberler, profesyonel tank incelemeleri ve moderatör gözüyle en doğru sızıntılar için videoyu beğenmeyi ve tek resmi TÜRK ŞAHİNLERİ kanalına abone olmayı unutmayın! Namlunuz soğumasın, yeni oyunun paletleri düz bassın Komutanlar!  #WorldOfTanksHEAT #WoT #YeniOyun #FirstLook #TankSavaşları #TÜRKŞAHİNLERİ #MobileGaming #ModernTanks #WoTTürkiye #OyunSohbeti #YeniÇıktı #Oynanış #Mayıs2026

title: World Of Tanks HEAT ÇIKTI !! İlk Bakış, İnceleme ve Oynanış
description: Merhaba arkadaşlar! Bugün oyun dünyasına bomba gibi düşen yepyeni bir oyunu, World of Tanks HEAT'i hep birlikte inceliyoruz! Wargaming'in bu yeni projesi, alışık olduğumuz tank savaşlarını tamamen farklı bir boyuta taşıyor. Videonun içeriğinde oyunun grafik kalitesini, yeni eklenen oynanış mekaniklerini, tank çeşitliliğini ve oyunun genel temposunu ilk elden test ediyoruz. Eski World of Tanks ile arasındaki farklar neler, optimizasyonu nasıl ve en önemlisi oynamaya değer mi? Tüm bu soruların cevabı bu ilk bakış videosunda! ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Bu kanalda War Thunder tank savaşları, uçak dogfight’ları, helikopter görevleri, zırhlı araç rehberleri ve kamera destekli taktiksel oynanış videoları seni bekliyor.  Oynadığım araçlar: • Modern ana muharebe tankları (MBT) • Avcı uçakları ve jetler • Hafif tanklar, zırhlı araçlar • Helikopterler ve SPAA sistemleri  İçerik Türleri: • War Thunder Türkçe oynanış videoları • Araç incelemeleri ve analizler • Güncel yama notları ve değişiklikler • En iyi grind rotaları ve taktik önerileri  War Thunder ile ilgili her şey burada: • War Thunder Türkiye topluluğu için özel içerikler • Kamera görüntülü, açıklamalı ve stratejik anlatımlı bölümler • Düşük BR’den yüksek BR’ye etkili oynanış örnekleri  Abone olmayı ve War Thunder içeriklerinden haberdar olmak için bildirimleri açmayı unutma! #WarThunder #WarThunderTürkçe #TankOynanış #SoloWThunder #HelicopterBattles #JetDogfight #WarThunderTürkiye #MBT #ZırhlıAraçlar

title: WARGAMING VYDAL NOVÉ WORLD OF TANKS! | World of Tanks: HEAT
description: Zdravíčko, dámy a pánové! Já jsem Filbos a dneska se společně podíváme na žhavou novinku od Wargamingu – World of Tanks Heat. Hra právě vstoupila do open bety (nebo už rovnou vyšla) a my se podíváme, jak moc se změnila od dob, kdy se ještě jmenovala Projekt CW. Představte si klasické WoTko říznuté Fortnite mechanikami – rychlé bitvy, šílené speciální abilitky, třpytky, hvězdičky a tanky inspirované realitou, ze kterých se občas vyklube solidní sci-fi. Místo klasického výzkumného stromu tu máme agenty, což mi úplně nesedí, ale uvidíme, jak se to vybarví. Vydáme se do bitev 5v5 a 10v10 s tankem XM190 (Kent), zažijeme taktický atomový úder a pokusím se (víceméně úspěšně) pochopit, co dělají moje vlastní superschopnosti! Hráli jste to už, nebo se na to teprve chystáte? Jakékoliv tipy a triky do začátku moc ocením v komentářích! Pokud se vám video líbilo, nezapomeňte hodit lajk, odběr a komentář. Díky za podporu! dej odběr na můj druhý kanál kde vycházejí záznamy ze streamů https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9Jd... můj Instagram https://www.instagram.com/filboss_/ Můj discord server https://discord.gg/9QfY38N Budu rád za každý like odběr nebo koment
creator: FILBOSS

title: CANHÃO AUTOMÁTICO GIGANTE! Vale a Pena o Kent? - World of Tanks HEAT
description: Fala galera, Deimos aqui! No vídeo de hoje de World of Tanks HEAT, vamos testar o novo agente Kent! Ele vem equipado no chassi do XM1, mas conta com um canhão automático de 90mm — um verdadeiro autoloader gigantesco! Será que esse tanque realmente vale a pena no meta atual ou ele é apenas um veículo de suporte focado em flancos e com pouca perfuração? Confira essa gameplay 100% sincera onde analiso a blindagem, as mecânicas de jogo e mostro o desempenho dele em partida (com direito a um Double Kill insano depois de morto!).  LIVES COM TWITCH DROPS: Lembrando que sábado teremos live jogando World of Tanks HEAT na Twitch, YouTube e Kick! Assista na Twitch para garantir seus Boosters e dar aquele belo UP na sua conta! Me assista la! procure por d31m0s!  Deixe nos comentários: você já testou o Kent? Curtiu o estilo de jogo dele? Não esqueça de deixar o seu LIKE e se INSCREVER para fortalecer o canal! ⏱ Capítulos do Vídeo: 00:00 - Introdução e Detalhes do Novo Agente Kent (XM1) 01:01 - Avisos importantes: Lives e Twitch Drops de Boosters 01:31 - Analisando a Blindagem Efetiva no Jogo 02:07 - Primeira Partida: Estratégia de Flanco e Dificuldades 06:12 - Segunda Partida: Uso da Ult e Double Kill do Além-Túmulo 10:21 - O Incrível AC-130 em Ação! 11:34 - Veredito Sincero sobre o Kent: Vale a pena? title: World of Tanks HEAT — это уже не WoT? РАЗБОР нового трейлера
description: Буквально час назад на официальном YouTube-канале вышел новый трейлер World of Tanks: HEAT — игры, которая ещё не вышла, но уже вызывает много вопросов. В этом видео я смотрю ролик вместе с вами и по ходу разбираю, что именно анонсировали разработчики: — новые PvP-режимы, — агенты вместо привычных командиров, — расширенная кастомизация танков, — более аркадный геймплей с постоянным возвращением в бой. Также делюсь первыми сомнениями по интерфейсу — он выглядит довольно перегруженным, с большим количеством мелких элементов, и не сразу понятно, куда смотреть в бою. Возможно, при хорошем обучении это не станет проблемой. Отдельно вспоминаю предыдущий тестовый проект Wargaming — Project CW, и ощущения от стрельбы, где выстрелы казались «лёгкими», без ощущения веса и отдачи. Очень интересно, как этот момент будет реализован в World of Tanks: HEAT. С вами, как всегда, Andraw_wot. Усаживайтесь поудобнее — мы начинаем.
creator: Andraw_wot

title: Raketa: OBJ.287 in Action | 4K Gameplay – World of Tanks: HEAT
description: Welcome to World of Tanks: HEAT gameplay featuring the powerful OBJ.287 “Raketa” in action on the Nexus Dam map. In this match, the mode is Conquest, where the objective is simple but intense:  Capture and hold multiple bases to reach 2,000 points and secure victory.  Match Details: Mode: Conquest Map: Nexus Dam Format: 10v10 Respawns: Unlimited Objective: Capture and control multiple bases The Nexus Dam map offers a unique battlefield with a massive dam structure, open water zones, and strategic high-ground positions. Controlling key areas is essential to dominate the enemy team and maintain point advantage. Watch how the OBJ.287 Raketa performs in this dynamic environment, combining mobility, positioning, and firepower to influence the outcome of the battle.
